prompt: My Obsidian vault has been growing for 2 years and I think it's gotten messy. I want to do a health check: find orphan notes, broken links, and deadend notes. Then I want to move anything tagged #archived to my 4-Archive/ folder. Walk me through the exact CLI commands I'd run and what to do with the results.
assertions: Uses 'obsidian orphans' to find disconnected notes
Uses 'obsidian unresolved' to find broken links
Uses 'obsidian deadends' to find dead-end notes
Uses 'obsidian tag tag="#archived"' (or similar correct syntax) to find archived notes
Uses 'obsidian move file=... to=...' syntax for moving files (not cp or mv)
CLI parameter style is param=value (Obsidian CLI convention), not --param
